title: Police appeal for assistance in locating missing George teen
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Family Violence,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) Unit has launched an urgent appeal to the public for assistance in locating 14-year-old Geraldine Kammies, who was reported missing at the Conville Police Station on Saturday, 25 October.


> According to police reports, Geraldine left her home in Galjoen Street, Marais Kamp on Tuesday, 22 October, to attend school but never arrived and has not been seen since.


At the time of her disappearance, she was wearing a pink shirt, grey skirt and pink sandals.

Authorities are urging anyone who may have information about her whereabouts to come forward immediately.

Members of the public can contact the George FCS Unit on 082 335 1200 or call Crime Stop at 08600 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
